title: Craft It All
description: A simple mod which makes uncraftable items like name tags and spawn eggs craftable.
body:
# 🧱 What is this mod?
This is a simple, lightweight mod that adds a wide variety of new crafting recipes to Minecraft.

# 🍳 What recipes does it add?
You’ll be able to craft items that are normally unobtainable through crafting, like:

- Spawn eggs

- Command blocks

- Name tags

- Chainmail armor

- Netherite gear

...and much more!


If you've ever wanted more flexibility in survival mode, this mod has you covered.

# 💡 Why should I use this mod?
Stuck in the plains with no mobs around? Got feathers and eggs but no chickens? No problem — craft a chicken spawn egg! This mod makes survival much better and makes items that are hard to obtain much easier. It's a great tool for survival players as it makes items that should be craftable, craftable, great!

# 🛠 Supported Mod Loaders & Versions
Currently available for NeoForge 1.21.1 only.
More loaders and versions may be added in the future — let me know if you'd like support for a specific one!
